ogTitle: Rum Jungle vs Sandover: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rum Jungle and Sandover.
heading: Rum Jungle vs Sandover — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rum Jungle, Northern Territory and Sandover, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rum Jungle has a lower overall climate risk score (23/100) compared to Sandover (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rum Jungle or Sandover safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rum Jungle has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Sandover scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rum Jungle scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Sandover scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rum Jungle or Sandover?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rum Jungle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
